statusDefinitions.source_candidate: Parcel is in the 7-128 source list and has not been screened.
statusDefinitions.already_built: Parcel already exists in the manifest.
statusDefinitions.screened_vg3_candidate: GWorks PDF screens as a conservative Beatrice residential candidate.
statusDefinitions.queued_for_build: Candidate selected for full NTO/GWorks record-card build.
statusDefinitions.built_research: Record card is built and kept out of the public switcher.
statusDefinitions.built_public: Record card is built and available in the public switcher.
statusDefinitions.rejected_download_failed: GWorks assessor PDF could not be downloaded.
statusDefinitions.rejected_pdf_parse_failed: PDF downloaded but could not be parsed.
statusDefinitions.rejected_non_residential: GWorks does not classify the parcel as residential.
statusDefinitions.rejected_rural_address: Address looks rural/county-road rather than Beatrice street-grid.
statusDefinitions.rejected_unusable_address: Address is missing or too ambiguous for VG3 proxy selection.
